chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-6060 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.25194/2017. 2. For orders on Misc. No.25195/2017. 3. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that a similar absence also prevailed on the previous date and the matter has been pending over a protracted period without having been properly pursued. Under the given circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
